2605.00462.title: Adaptation of AI-accelerated CFD Simulations to the IPU platform
2605.00462.paper_summary: Intelligence Processing Units (IPU) have proven useful for many AI applications. In this paper, we evaluate them within the emerging field of \emph{AI for simulation}, where traditional numerical simulations are supported by artificial intelligence approaches. We focus specifically on a program for training machine learning models supporting a \emph{computational fluid dynamics} application. We use custom TensorFlow provided by the Poplar SDK to adapt the program for the IPU-POD16 platform and investigate its ease of use and performance scalability. Training a model on data from OpenFOAM simulations allows us to get accurate simulation state predictions in test time. We show how to utilize the \emph{popdist} library to overcome a performance bottleneck in feeding training data to the IPU on the host side, achieving up to 34\% speedup. Due to communication overheads, using data parallelism to utilize two IPUs instead of one does not improve the throughput. However, once the intra-IPU costs have been paid, the hardware capabilities for inter-IPU communication allow for good scalability. Increasing the number of IPUs from 2 to 16 improves the throughput from 560.8 to 2805.8 samples/s.
2605.00462.paper_summary_zh: 智慧處理單元（IPU）已被證明對許多人工智慧應用有用。<lb/>在本篇論文中，我們在新興的\emph{模擬中的人工智慧}領域中評估它們，這裡傳統的數值模擬受到人工智慧方法的支持。<lb/>我們專注於一個用於訓練機器學習模型的程序，該模型支持\emph{計算流體動力學}應用。<lb/>我們使用Poplar SDK提供的自訂TensorFlow，將該程序調整為適用於IPU-POD16平台，並調查其易用性和性能擴展性。<lb/>在OpenFOAM模擬數據上訓練模型使我們能夠在測試時獲得準確的模擬狀態預測。<lb/>我們展示了如何利用\emph{popdist}庫來克服在主機端將訓練數據傳送到IPU的性能瓶頸，實現高達34\%的加速。<lb/>由於通信開銷，使用數據並行性來利用兩個IPU而不是一個並不會提高吞吐量。<lb/>然而，一旦支付了內部IPU的成本，硬體在IPU間通信的能力則允許良好的擴展性。<lb/>將IPU的數量從2增加到16，吞吐量從560.8提高到2805.8樣本/秒。
2605.00462.author: P. Rosciszewski et.al.
2605.00462.authors: P. Rosciszewski, A. Krzywaniak, S. Iserte, K. Rojek, P. Gepner
